key_dungeons.name: Blighted Sanctum
key_dungeons.description: Water seeps from the walls near Blighted Sanctum's entrance. The stone steps descend into darkness.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Retrieve the Obsidian Key from Blighted Sanctum
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A powerful artifact lies in the deepest chamber.

key_dungeons.name: Frozen Cavern
key_dungeons.description: Crumbling pillars mark the way into Frozen Cavern. Faint scratching echoes from deep within.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Slay the guardian of Frozen Cavern and claim the Opal Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A fearsome creature guards the prize.

game_log: A massive gnomish machine blocks the sun! It has 8 empty keyhole slots.
A perfectly still pool of dark water in a forest clearing. Your reflection stares back, but its expression doesn't match yours.
Your reflection speaks: 'I see what you seek. The Realm of Shadow stirs. Three seals bind it. Break them... or don't.'
Orin: I shouldn't say this, but... something's been poisoning our well water.
Orin: I think it's coming from that old ruin to the north. Can you help?
Orin: Thank you! I've marked a suspicious location on your map. Be careful down there!
